title: Campaign Test Infrastructure Map
mission: map existing test infrastructure for the campaign layer
summary: Comprehensive map of test infrastructure relevant to the campaign/ layer. Primary finding: zero direct campaign test coverage exists. The campaign module (16 source files) has no corresponding test directory and no test file imports from it.

responsibilities.state-machine.ts: LANE_STATE_MACHINE spec, transition evaluation, predicate checking, CampaignState interface, StateTransition interface, RuntimeEvent interface (491 lines)
responsibilities.predicates.ts: EvidenceRef, PredicateResult, PredicateSpec, PredicateResolver, TransitionSpec, checkPredicate(), checkTransitions(), predicateResolvers registry (751 lines - largest file)
responsibilities.binder.ts: Binder interface (lane identity, owner, events, diffs, validations, red-team findings, repair cycles), Service class, BinderError, computeDigest (466 lines)
responsibilities.secretary.ts: Lane lifecycle orchestration - lane state tracking, transition records, role outputs, event replay, LaneState/LaneReadState interfaces, LaneNotFoundError, InvalidEventError, LaneNotTerminalError (642 lines)
responsibilities.context-packet.ts: CampaignContextPacket, LaneContext, buildContextPacket(), formatPacketForLLM() - builds LLM-consumable context summary from campaign state (139 lines)
responsibilities.types.ts: Schema definitions: LaneState, CampaignState, TerminalStatus, RoleType, ProposedBy; interfaces: EvidenceRef, RuntimeEvent, Transition, Role, Binder, Lane, Campaign (180 lines)
responsibilities.auditor.ts: Audit checks, AuditFinding, AuditReport, CampaignAuditData, LaneAuditData
responsibilities.push-gate.ts: GateResult, PushGate, PushGateContext - publication gate logic
responsibilities.push-record.ts: PushRecord, GateEval, PushStatus, CreatePushRecordInput - publication record tracking

direct_campaign_test_coverage.finding: A test/campaign/ directory exists but contains only a 4-line placeholder comment file (test_state_machine.ts). Zero test files under packages/opencode/test/ import from @/campaign or reference campaign-layer types, services, or layers.

closest_coverage.relationship: Tests TaskClaim primitives (getClaim, getSessionClaims, getWaveClaims, checkPathReserved, getFanOutGroup) at the coordination/tool level â€” not the campaign orchestration layer
closest_coverage.gap: Campaign layer builds on top of coordination primitives but has no tests of its own binder, secretary, state-machine, predicates, or context-packet logic

relevant_existing_findings.summary: CT-003 surface area map complete â€” 4 findings, 5 smoking guns
relevant_existing_findings.relevance: If CT-003 covered campaign layer, those findings would be directly applicable

test_directory_structure.campaign_dir_status: EXISTS but contains only placeholder (test_state_machine.ts with zero real tests)

files.description: Core test harness. testEffect<R,E>(layer) returns {effect, live, instance} â€” each a bun:test wrapper that runs Effect code through an Effect layer. 'effect' and 'live' variants provide TestClock/TestConsole isolation vs real clock. 'instance' variant creates tmpdir-backed TestInstance. testEffectShared uses shared memoMap for Bus/Session identity with in-process HTTP server.
In-process fake LLM server (random port). Supports SSE streaming, matched reply queues, usage tracking. Context.Service used for Layer-based provision.
Generates provider config pointing to a test LLM server URL. Registers provider 'test' with model 'test-model'.
Subprocess CLI test harness. Spawns real opencode binary against a TestLLMServer with full env isolation. Supports run, serve, and acp command modes.
Scoped file writing helper that auto-cleans up on scope close.
Cross-OS snapshot normalization (CRLFâ†’LF, tmpdir stripping, path separator normalization).
Simple FakeWebSocket implementation for testing WebSocket-dependent code.

test_fixture_library.description: Test instance management â€” creates isolated tmpdir-based project instances with optional git init and config. Provides scoped instance lifecycle via Effect layers. TestInstance is a Context.Service for directory injection.

test_patterns_observed.description: Primary test pattern. testEffect(layer) creates {effect, live, instance} from a Layer. 'live' uses real clock + TestConsole. Tests are Effect generators yielding services from the provided layer.
Tests that need database access provide DatabaseAdapter.defaultLayer via testEffect. Raw SQL INSERTs set up test data directly into coordination tables.
Longer test files wrap related tests in describe() blocks from bun:test. Each describe block may define its own 'it' via testEffect.
Integration tests merge multiple service layers via Layer.mergeAll() before passing to testEffect.

test_patterns_observed.pattern: Direct DB insertion for test setup
test_patterns_observed.prevalence: used in coordination and storage tests
test_patterns_observed.description: Tests set up state by directly inserting rows into coordination tables via DatabaseAdapter.Service.query(db => db.run(...)). No factory functions or fixture generators observed for campaign-layer types like Binder or Lane.

test_patterns_observed.prevalence: used in control-plane and server tests
test_patterns_observed.description: Creates tmpdir-backed instance with optional git init and config. Cleaned up after test. Third argument is bun:test timeout in ms.

formats minimal task without wave info
formats includes wave info when wave > 0
formats includes result and error when present

tests: after release, the path is no longer reserved
tests.assertions: checkPathReserved returns non-null for reserved paths with correct taskId; returns null after status='released'
getClaim returns correct sessionId, getSessionClaims returns correct count
getFanOutGroup returns non-null with correct taskIds and completeCount

tests: wave claims report released, failed, and claimed statuses
wave claims are scoped to their wave
tests.assertions: getWaveClaims returns correct statuses across 3 claims; wave-scoped queries return only matching wave claims

tests: reserved path is reported by checkPathReserved
tests.assertions: checkPathReserved returns path/taskId/createdAt fields correctly; stale reservations persist

tests: returns null for non-existent fan-out group
tests.assertions: All null checks for missing resources

coordination_test_coverage.gap_analysis: These tests cover coordination primitives (claims, reservations, fan-out groups) at the DatabaseAdapter level. The campaign layer builds on top of these primitives through binder.ts and secretary.ts, adding state-machine transitions, predicate checks, lane lifecycle, and context packet construction â€” none of which are tested.

untested: createInitialBinder() â€” creates binder from lane identity and digest
Binder Service layer â€” full CRUD lifecycle
Full lane lifecycle: claiming â†’ learning â†’ planning â†’ reviewing â†’ executing â†’ validating â†’ stressing â†’ repairing â†’ publishing
Terminal lane state detection (published_candidate_boundary, verified_narrow_release, etc.)
evaluatePredicate() â€” predicate evaluation with evidence
reduceCampaignState() â€” state reduction across lanes
All 20+ built-in predicate resolvers (succeeded, failed, payload, resolveEventExists, resolveLatestValidationPassed, etc.)
buildContextPacket() â€” assembles full CampaignContextPacket from campaign state
formatPacketForLLM() â€” produces LLM-readable text summary
Event projection for campaign state reconstruction
Role-based contract enforcement for lane stages

smoking_guns.title: Zero campaign test coverage
smoking_guns.detail: The campaign module has 16 source files (~4000+ lines) with zero test files. No test file imports from @/campaign. No test/campaign/ directory exists.
smoking_guns.impact: Any refactoring or bug fix in binder, secretary, state-machine, or predicates has no safety net. The lane lifecycle machinery (claimedâ†’learningâ†’planningâ†’reviewingâ†’executingâ†’validatingâ†’stressingâ†’repairingâ†’publishing) is completely untested.

smoking_guns.title: Coordination tests only cover primitive level
smoking_guns.detail: test/tool/coordination.test.ts tests TaskClaim CRUD and formatStructuredResult at the raw DB level. It does not test the campaign orchestration that builds on these primitives (binder creation, secretary lane management, state-machine transitions).
smoking_guns.impact: Bug in how the campaign layer composes coordination primitives would pass existing tests.

smoking_guns.title: No EventStore replay/reconstruction tests at campaign layer
smoking_guns.detail: The secretary module depends on EventStore for event replay and lane state reconstruction. No tests exist for: (a) replaying events to rebuild lane state, (b) handling partial/malformed event streams, (c) EventStore failure modes during secretary operations.
smoking_guns.impact: EventStore-dependent lane state reconstruction is unverified.

smoking_guns.title: No predicate resolver test coverage
smoking_guns.detail: predicates.ts exports ~20+ predicate resolvers (succeeded, failed, resolveEventExists, resolveLatestValidationPassed, etc.) with zero test coverage. These resolvers form the backbone of state-machine transition validation.
smoking_guns.impact: Transition gating logic is untested â€” a misconfigured predicate silently allows or blocks transitions.

smoking_guns.title: No context packet test coverage
smoking_guns.detail: buildContextPacket() and formatPacketForLLM() produce the LLM-consumable context summary. No tests verify correctness of the assembled packet or the formatted output.
smoking_guns.impact: LLM receives potentially malformed context packets â€” hard to diagnose in production.

smoking_guns.title: No cross-layer integration test harness exists
smoking_guns.detail: The test infrastructure has no fixture for creating campaign test data (lane fixtures, binder fixtures, event fixtures). test/fixture/fixture.ts provides instance management but not campaign-layer test data factories.
smoking_guns.impact: Writing campaign tests requires building fixture infrastructure from scratch.

test_infrastructure_gaps: No campaign-layer test data factory (createTestLane, createTestBinder, createTestCampaign)
No campaign-layer service layer mock/fake provision (e.g., FakeSecretary layer)
No EventStore fake for campaign tests (campaign tests would need isolated event streams)
No test fixture for lane lifecycle scenarios (happy path, critic rejection, validation failure, red-team finding, terminal state)
No snapshot/normalization helpers for campaign context packets

searches_performed: smart_grep for 'ContextPacket|Claim|ownership|lane.*lifecycle|EventStore' in *.test.ts â€” found coordination.test.ts and workspace.test.ts
smart_find for *.test.ts in packages/opencode/test/ â€” fd not available, used eza --tree
eza --tree -L 3 packages/opencode/test/ â€” full directory listing
read_source on campaign/index.ts, types.ts, binder.ts, secretary.ts, state-machine.ts, predicates.ts, context-packet.ts
read_source on test/lib/effect.ts, test/lib/test-provider.ts, test/lib/filesystem.ts, test/lib/snapshot.ts, test/lib/websocket.ts, test/lib/cli-process.ts, test/lib/llm-server.ts (summary)

tools_with_issues.issue: fd binary not installed on macOS â€” all smart_find calls fail
tools_with_issues.workaround: Used eza --tree via smart_bash for directory listing
